fieldValues.value: RFC-004 Change C: Add schema-definition type
Add `com.semanticops.spec/schema-definition` to represent one logical data shape with namespace, schema name, version, description, semantic purpose, status, examples, deprecation, and notes.
A schema-definition is not itself JSON Schema, TypeScript, or protobuf. It is the semantic source that target packages may render.

sourceRefs.note: Structured RFC-004 process record derived from the RFC-004 proposal content.
